### S2 — Convention files and rule migrations

T006 integrates .claude/rules/06 patterns into the existing security.md (with dead-ref fix), refreshing the index if metadata changes, and removes the old rule file.
> Each task can be committed and pass CI independently because convention file changes and their knowledge/conventions/README.md index updates are kept together. This ordering ensures that the convention replacements exist before S3 removes track/workflow.md or DEVELOPER_AI_WORKFLOW.md and rewires their downstream references.
